sub_modules.gd_poly_gradient: Combinational fixed-point derivative calculator for f'(x) = 2*a*x + b with Q-format rescaling.
sub_modules.gd_poly_step: Combinational fixed-point learning-rate multiplier computing alpha * gradient with Q-format rescaling.
sub_modules.gd_poly_update: Combinational gradient descent update subtracting the scaled step from the current estimate.
